structured_payload_candidate.title: Automatic Zone Minimum Airflow Vmin Calculation (62.1)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Vmin set to Voz if 'AUTO' and 100% OA for 10 min, else 1.5×Voz if 'AUTO' and not 100% OA, else manual Vmin.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Vmin in Section 3.1.2 is 'AUTO'.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Calculate Voz per 5.2.1.3.f and assign Vmin according to AHU outdoor air status.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: d. Vmin 1. Shall be equal to Voz as calculated in Section 5.2.1.3.f below if Vmin in Section 3.1.2 is “AUTO” and the associated air handler has been supplying 100% outdoor air (outdoor air damper fully open; return air damper fully closed) for 10 minutes; 2. Else shall be equal to 1.5 * Voz as calculated in Section 5.2.1.3.f below if Vmin in Section 3.1.2 is “AUTO” and the associated air handler is not supplying 100% outdoor air; 3. Else shall be equal Vmin as entered in Section 3.1.2.

evidence_quote: d. Vmin 1. Shall be equal to Voz as calculated in Section 5.2.1.3.f below if Vmin in Section 3.1.2 is “AUTO” and the associated air handler has been supplying 100% outdoor air (outdoor air damper fully open; return air damper fully closed) for 10 minutes; 2. Else shall be equal to 1.5 * Voz as calculated in Section 5.2.1.3.f below if Vmin in Section 3.1.2 is “AUTO” and the associated air handler is not supplying 100% outdoor air; 3. Else shall be equal Vmin as entered in Section 3.1.2.
evidence_text: d. Vmin 1. Shall be equal to Voz as calculated in Section 5.2.1.3.f below if Vmin in Section 3.1.2 is “AUTO” and the associated air handler has been supplying 100% outdoor air (outdoor air damper fully open; return air damper fully closed) for 10 minutes; 2. Else shall be equal to 1.5 * Voz as calculated in Section 5.2.1.3.f below if Vmin in Section 3.1.2 is “AUTO” and the associated air handler is not supplying 100% outdoor air; 3. Else shall be equal Vmin as entered in Section 3.1.2.
judge_reason: Operational sequence for automatic Vmin calculation per Standard 62.1, supported by evidence.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Normal Breathing Zone Outdoor Airflow Components
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Vbz-P* defaults to Vbz-P and Vbz-A* defaults to Vbz-A.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Normal operation, unless overridden by priority rules.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. Vbz-P* is the population component of the required breathing zone outdoor airflow. The normal value of Vbz-P* shall be Vbz-P. Vbz-A* is the area component of the required breathing zone outdoor airflow. The normal value of Vbz-A* shall be Vbz-A.

evidence_quote: c. Vbz-P* is the population component of the required breathing zone outdoor airflow. The normal value of Vbz-P* shall be Vbz-P. Vbz-A* is the area component of the required breathing zone outdoor airflow. The normal value of Vbz-A* shall be Vbz-A.
evidence_text: c. Vbz-P* is the population component of the required breathing zone outdoor airflow. The normal value of Vbz-P* shall be Vbz-P. Vbz-A* is the area component of the required breathing zone outdoor airflow. The normal value of Vbz-A* shall be Vbz-A.
judge_reason: Defines normal breathing zone outdoor airflow components, grounded operational definition.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Air Distribution Effectiveness Based on DAT
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Ez set to EzC (cooling) if DAT ≤ zone temperature, else EzH (heating), with defaults 1.0 and 0.8 respectively.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Whenever determining zone air distribution effectiveness.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set Ez according to the rule.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 1. If the DAT at the terminal unit is less than or equal to zone space temperature, Ez shall be equal to EzC (default to 1.0 if no value is scheduled). 2. If the DAT at the terminal unit is greater than zone space temperature, Ez shall be equal to EzH (default to 0.8 if no value is scheduled).

evidence_quote: 1. If the DAT at the terminal unit is less than or equal to zone space temperature, Ez shall be equal to EzC (default to 1.0 if no value is scheduled). 2. If the DAT at the terminal unit is greater than zone space temperature, Ez shall be equal to EzH (default to 0.8 if no value is scheduled).
evidence_text: 1. If the DAT at the terminal unit is less than or equal to zone space temperature, Ez shall be equal to EzC (default to 1.0 if no value is scheduled). 2. If the DAT at the terminal unit is greater than zone space temperature, Ez shall be equal to EzH (default to 0.8 if no value is scheduled).
judge_reason: Operational rule for zone air distribution effectiveness based on DAT, grounded in evidence.

structured_payload_candidate.title: CO2 DCV Reset for Standard VAV and Dual-Duct Terminals (62.1)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Cooling-only VAV, reheat VAV, constant-volume series fan-powered, dual-duct VAV with mixing control and airflow sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: CO2 loop resets Vmin* from Vmin to Vcool-max (0-100%) and Vbz-P* from 0 to Vbz-P.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone has CO2 sensor, Occupied Mode, and terminal type matches.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reset both setpoints in parallel according to CO2 loop output.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: (a) The CO2 control loop output shall reset both the occupied minimum airflow setpoint (Vmin*) and the population component of the required breathing zone outdoor airflow (Vbz-P*) in parallel. Vmin* shall be reset from the zone minimum airflow setpoint Vmin at 0% loop output up to maximum cooling airflow setpoint Vcool-max at 100% loop output. Vbz-P* shall be reset from 0 L/s (0 cfm) at 0% loop output up to the Vbz-P at 100% loop output.

evidence_quote: (a) The CO2 control loop output shall reset both the occupied minimum airflow setpoint (Vmin*) and the population component of the required breathing zone outdoor airflow (Vbz-P*) in parallel. Vmin* shall be reset from the zone minimum airflow setpoint Vmin at 0% loop output up to maximum cooling airflow setpoint Vcool-max at 100% loop output. Vbz-P* shall be reset from 0 L/s (0 cfm) at 0% loop output up to the Vbz-P at 100% loop output.
evidence_text: (a) The CO2 control loop output shall reset both the occupied minimum airflow setpoint (Vmin*) and the population component of the required breathing zone outdoor airflow (Vbz-P*) in parallel. Vmin* shall be reset from the zone minimum airflow setpoint Vmin at 0% loop output up to maximum cooling airflow setpoint Vcool-max at 100% loop output. Vbz-P* shall be reset from 0 L/s (0 cfm) at 0% loop output up to the Vbz-P at 100% loop output.
judge_reason: CO2 DCV reset logic for standard terminals, fully supported by evidence quote.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Occupied Minimum Airflow Initialization
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Vmin* initially equals Vmin, except as modified by priority rules in 5.2.1.3.f.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Default state.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: e. The occupied minimum airflow Vmin* shall be equal to Vmin except as noted in Section 5.2.1.3.f.

evidence_quote: e. The occupied minimum airflow Vmin* shall be equal to Vmin except as noted in Section 5.2.1.3.f.
evidence_text: e. The occupied minimum airflow Vmin* shall be equal to Vmin except as noted in Section 5.2.1.3.f.
judge_reason: Operational rule for occupied minimum airflow initialization, clearly supported.

structured_payload_candidate.title: P-Only CO2 Control Loop (62.1)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: During Occupied Mode, P-only loop maintains CO2 at setpoint, output reset from 0% at setpoint-200ppm to 100% at setpoint; disabled when not Occupied.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone has CO2 sensor and is in Occupied Mode.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Run P-only loop, reset output per range, disable outside Occupied.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: ii. During Occupied Mode, a P-only loop shall maintain CO2 concentration at setpoint; reset from 0% at setpoint minus 200 PPM and to 100% at setpoint. iii. Loop is disabled and output set to zero when the zone is not in Occupied Mode.

evidence_quote: ii. During Occupied Mode, a P-only loop shall maintain CO2 concentration at setpoint; reset from 0% at setpoint minus 200 PPM and to 100% at setpoint. iii. Loop is disabled and output set to zero when the zone is not in Occupied Mode.
evidence_text: ii. During Occupied Mode, a P-only loop shall maintain CO2 concentration at setpoint; reset from 0% at setpoint minus 200 PPM and to 100% at setpoint. iii. Loop is disabled and output set to zero when the zone is not in Occupied Mode.
judge_reason: P-only CO2 control loop specification, detailed operational rule.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Ventilation Reduction: Unpopulated without Occupied-Standby
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If occupancy sensor, unpopulated, but occupied-standby not permitted, set Vbz-P*=0 and Vmin*=Vmin.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone has occupancy sensor, unpopulated, occupied-standby mode not permitted.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set Vbz-P* to 0, keep Vmin* at Vmin.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 3. Else, if the zone has an occupancy sensor, is unpopulated, but occupied-standby mode is not permitted: Vbz-P* = 0 and Vmin* = Vmin.

evidence_quote: 3. Else, if the zone has an occupancy sensor, is unpopulated, but occupied-standby mode is not permitted: Vbz-P* = 0 and Vmin* = Vmin.
evidence_text: 3. Else, if the zone has an occupancy sensor, is unpopulated, but occupied-standby mode is not permitted: Vbz-P* = 0 and Vmin* = Vmin.
judge_reason: Ventilation reduction rule for unpopulated without occupied-standby, clear operational sequence.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Ventilation Zero Override: Unoccupied or Window Open
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When zone not Occupied or window open, set Vbz-P*=0, Vbz-A*=0, Vmin*=0.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone in any mode other than Occupied Mode, or zone has window switch and window is open.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 1. If the zone is in any mode other than Occupied Mode, and for zones that have window switches and the window is open: Vbz-P* = 0, Vbz-A* = 0, and Vmin* = 0.

evidence_quote: 1. If the zone is in any mode other than Occupied Mode, and for zones that have window switches and the window is open: Vbz-P* = 0, Vbz-A* = 0, and Vmin* = 0.
evidence_text: 1. If the zone is in any mode other than Occupied Mode, and for zones that have window switches and the window is open: Vbz-P* = 0, Vbz-A* = 0, and Vmin* = 0.
judge_reason: Operational override for ventilation when unoccupied or window open, directly from section.

structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone has occupancy sensor, is unpopulated, and occupied-standby mode is permitted.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 2. If the zone has an occupancy sensor, is unpopulated, and occupied-standby mode is permitted: Vbz-P* = 0, Vbz-A* = 0, and Vmin* = 0.

evidence_quote: 2. If the zone has an occupancy sensor, is unpopulated, and occupied-standby mode is permitted: Vbz-P* = 0, Vbz-A* = 0, and Vmin* = 0.
evidence_text: 2. If the zone has an occupancy sensor, is unpopulated, and occupied-standby mode is permitted: Vbz-P* = 0, Vbz-A* = 0, and Vmin* = 0.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Outdoor Airflow Voz Calculation
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Voz = (Vbz-A* + Vbz-P*)/Ez, with modifications per priority.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Whenever Voz is needed.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Compute Voz with potentially modified Vbz-A*, Vbz-P*.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: f. The required zone outdoor airflow Voz shall be calculated as Voz = (Vbz-A* + Vbz-P*)/Ez

evidence_quote: f. The required zone outdoor airflow Voz shall be calculated as Voz = (Vbz-A* + Vbz-P*)/Ez
evidence_text: f. The required zone outdoor airflow Voz shall be calculated as Voz = (Vbz-A* + Vbz-P*)/Ez
judge_reason: Formula for zone outdoor airflow calculation, operational guidance from guideline.

structured_payload_candidate.title: CO2 DCV Reset for SZVAV AHUs (62.1)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: MinOAsp set to Voz; CO2 loop resets Vbz-P* from 0 to Vbz-P.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: SZVAV AHU with CO2 sensor, Occupied Mode.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reset population component based on CO2 loop output.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: (a) The minimum outdoor air setpoint MinOAsp is equal to Voz. The CO2 control loop output shall reset the population component of the required breathing zone outdoor airflow Vbz-P* from 0 L/s (0 cfm) at 0% loop output up to Vbz-P at 100% loop output.

evidence_quote: (a) The minimum outdoor air setpoint MinOAsp is equal to Voz. The CO2 control loop output shall reset the population component of the required breathing zone outdoor airflow Vbz-P* from 0 L/s (0 cfm) at 0% loop output up to Vbz-P at 100% loop output.
evidence_text: (a) The minimum outdoor air setpoint MinOAsp is equal to Voz. The CO2 control loop output shall reset the population component of the required breathing zone outdoor airflow Vbz-P* from 0 L/s (0 cfm) at 0% loop output up to Vbz-P at 100% loop output.
judge_reason: CO2 DCV reset for SZVAV AHUs, clearly operational and supported by evidence.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Design Minimum Outdoor Air Determination (Title 24)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Zone-Des-OA-min: zero if window open; zero if unpopulated and occupied-standby allowed; else larger of Varea-min and Vocc-min.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Whenever Zone-Des-OA-min is needed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 2. Zone-Des-OA-min is equal to the following, in order from highest to lowest priority: i. Zero if the zone has a window switch and the window is open. ii. Zero if the zone has an occupancy sensor, is unpopulated, and is permitted to be in occupied-standby mode per Section 3.1.1.2.b.3. iii. The larger of Varea-min and Vocc-min otherwise.

evidence_quote: 2. Zone-Des-OA-min is equal to the following, in order from highest to lowest priority: i. Zero if the zone has a window switch and the window is open. ii. Zero if the zone has an occupancy sensor, is unpopulated, and is permitted to be in occupied-standby mode per Section 3.1.1.2.b.3. iii. The larger of Varea-min and Vocc-min otherwise.
evidence_text: 2. Zone-Des-OA-min is equal to the following, in order from highest to lowest priority: i. Zero if the zone has a window switch and the window is open. ii. Zero if the zone has an occupancy sensor, is unpopulated, and is permitted to be in occupied-standby mode per Section 3.1.1.2.b.3. iii. The larger of Varea-min and Vocc-min otherwise.
judge_reason: Determination of zone design minimum outdoor air per Title 24, operational rule with evidence.

structured_payload_candidate.title: CO2 DCV Reset for Standard Terminals (Title 24)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Cooling-only VAV, reheat VAV, constant-volume series fan-powered, dual-duct VAV with mixing control and airflow sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: CO2 loop resets Vmin* from Vmin (0%) to Vcool-max at 50% loop output; loop output 50-100% used at system level for OA reset.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone has CO2 sensor, Occupied Mode, terminal type matches.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reset Vmin* linearly to 50% output; beyond 50% passed to AHU for OA control.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: (a) The CO2 control loop output shall reset the occupied minimum airflow setpoint Vmin* from the zone minimum airflow setpoint Vmin at 0% up to maximum cooling airflow setpoint Vcool-max at 50%, as shown in Figure 5.2.1.4-1. The loop output from 50% to 100% will be used at the system level to reset outdoor air minimum; see AHU controls.

evidence_quote: (a) The CO2 control loop output shall reset the occupied minimum airflow setpoint Vmin* from the zone minimum airflow setpoint Vmin at 0% up to maximum cooling airflow setpoint Vcool-max at 50%, as shown in Figure 5.2.1.4-1. The loop output from 50% to 100% will be used at the system level to reset outdoor air minimum; see AHU controls.
evidence_text: (a) The CO2 control loop output shall reset the occupied minimum airflow setpoint Vmin* from the zone minimum airflow setpoint Vmin at 0% up to maximum cooling airflow setpoint Vcool-max at 50%, as shown in Figure 5.2.1.4-1. The loop output from 50% to 100% will be used at the system level to reset outdoor air minimum; see AHU controls.
judge_reason: CO2 DCV reset for Title 24 standard terminals, detailed operational guidance.

structured_payload_candidate.title: CO2 DCV Reset for SZVAV (Title 24)

structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: SZVAV AHU with CO2 sensor, Occupied Mode.

structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: (a) The minimum outdoor air setpoint MinOAsp shall be reset based on the zone CO2 control-loop signal from MinOA at 0% signal to DesOA at 100% signal. See Figure 5.2.1.4-3.

evidence_quote: (a) The minimum outdoor air setpoint MinOAsp shall be reset based on the zone CO2 control-loop signal from MinOA at 0% signal to DesOA at 100% signal. See Figure 5.2.1.4-3.
evidence_text: (a) The minimum outdoor air setpoint MinOAsp shall be reset based on the zone CO2 control-loop signal from MinOA at 0% signal to DesOA at 100% signal. See Figure 5.2.1.4-3.
judge_reason: CO2 DCV reset for SZVAV under Title 24, operational and evidence-supported.

structured_payload_candidate.title: CO2 Sensor Fault or Calibration Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If CO2 < 300 ppm, or Unoccupied >2 hours and CO2 >600 ppm, generate Level 3 alarm indicating sensor may be out of calibration.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: CO2 < 300 ppm, or (Unoccupied for >2 hours and CO2 >600 ppm).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 3 alarm with specific text.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: CO2 sensor reading out of expected range.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the CO2 concentration is less than 300 ppm, or the zone is in Unoccupied Mode for more than 2 hours and zone CO2 concentration exceeds 600 ppm, generate a Level 3 alarm. The alarm text shall identify the sensor and indicate that it may be out of calibration.

evidence_quote: a. If the CO2 concentration is less than 300 ppm, or the zone is in Unoccupied Mode for more than 2 hours and zone CO2 concentration exceeds 600 ppm, generate a Level 3 alarm. The alarm text shall identify the sensor and indicate that it may be out of calibration.
evidence_text: a. If the CO2 concentration is less than 300 ppm, or the zone is in Unoccupied Mode for more than 2 hours and zone CO2 concentration exceeds 600 ppm, generate a Level 3 alarm. The alarm text shall identify the sensor and indicate that it may be out of calibration.
judge_reason: CO2 sensor fault diagnostic rule, grounded operational check with thresholds.

structured_payload_candidate.title: CO2 Setpoint Exceedance Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If CO2 > setpoint +10% for >10 minutes, generate Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: CO2 > setpoint +10% for more than 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: CO2 concentration high relative to setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. If the CO2 concentration exceeds setpoint plus 10% for more than 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: b. If the CO2 concentration exceeds setpoint plus 10% for more than 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
evidence_text: b. If the CO2 concentration exceeds setpoint plus 10% for more than 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
judge_reason: CO2 setpoint exceedance alarm, diagnostic rule with evidence support.

structured_payload_candidate.title: TAV Closed Period and Damper Disable
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Closed period CP = TCT - OP; Vspt* set to 0; damper control loop disabled, output=0; at end of closed period, command damper to last open position then reenable.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: TAV mode, during closed period.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: f. Closed period. During the closed period, Vspt* shall be set to 0 for a period of time CP, where CP = TCT – OP. The VAV damper control loop shall be disabled with output set equal to 0 during the closed period. At the end of each closed period, the VAV damper shall be commanded to the last position from the previous open period prior to reenabling the control loop.

evidence_quote: f. Closed period. During the closed period, Vspt* shall be set to 0 for a period of time CP, where CP = TCT – OP. The VAV damper control loop shall be disabled with output set equal to 0 during the closed period. At the end of each closed period, the VAV damper shall be commanded to the last position from the previous open period prior to reenabling the control loop.
evidence_text: f. Closed period. During the closed period, Vspt* shall be set to 0 for a period of time CP, where CP = TCT – OP. The VAV damper control loop shall be disabled with output set equal to 0 during the closed period. At the end of each closed period, the VAV damper shall be commanded to the last position from the previous open period prior to reenabling the control loop.
judge_reason: TAV closed period and damper disable, clear operational rule with evidence.

structured_payload_candidate.title: TAV Cycling Until Exit Condition

structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Repeat cycles until Vspt exceeds Vm.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: g. During TAV mode, each cycle shall consist of an open and closed period that alternate until Vspt is greater than Vm.

evidence_quote: g. During TAV mode, each cycle shall consist of an open and closed period that alternate until Vspt is greater than Vm.
evidence_text: g. During TAV mode, each cycle shall consist of an open and closed period that alternate until Vspt is greater than Vm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: TAV Initial Random Offset

evidence_quote: h. When first entering TAV mode, start with an initial open period of duration RNDM*OP, where RNDM is a random number between 0.0 and 1.0.

structured_payload_candidate.title: TAV Open Period Calculation

evidence_quote: c. Open period. During the open period, the TAV airflow setpoint Vspt* shall be equal to Vm for a period of time OP, which is the larger of the following: d. 1.5 minutes or e. TCT multiplied by TAVratio
evidence_text: c. Open period. During the open period, the TAV airflow setpoint Vspt* shall be equal to Vm for a period of time OP, which is the larger of the following: d. 1.5 minutes or e. TCT multiplied by TAVratio
judge_reason: TAV open period calculation, directly from evidence and operational.

structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. The total cycle time (TCT) shall be 15 minutes (adjustable)

evidence_quote: b. The total cycle time (TCT) shall be 15 minutes (adjustable)

structured_payload_candidate.title: Time-Averaged Ventilation Activation and Ratio
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When active airflow setpoint Vspt is nonzero and less than the box controllable minimum Vm, pulse width modulate: TAVratio = Vspt/Vm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Vspt > 0 and Vspt < Vm.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.2.2.1. When the active airflow setpoint Vspt is nonzero and is less than the lowest possible airflow setpoint allowed by the controls (Vm), the airflow setpoint shall be pulse width modulated as follows: a. The time-averaged ventilation (TAV) ratio shall be determined as TAVratio = Vspt/Vm

structured_payload_candidate.title: TAV Override of Active Airflow Setpoint
